logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Creating pick ticket | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Priority: " ++ (vars.processingPriority default "STANDARD")]
logger.doc:name: Log Notify Request

http:request.doc:name: POST Warehouse Notify
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId, sku: vars.orderSku, quantity: vars.orderQuantity, customerId: vars.customerId, priority: vars.processingPriority default "STANDARD" }]

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Pick ticket created | TicketId: " ++ (payload.data.ticketId default "unknown") ++ " | Zone: " ++ (payload.data.location.zone default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Ticket Created

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Pick ticket creation failed | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log Warehouse Notify Error

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Fetching pick status | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Status Request

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Status retrieved | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Status: " ++ (payload.data.status default "UNKNOWN")]
logger.doc:name: Log Status Retrieved

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Status unavailable | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Warehouse Status Error

set-payload.value: #[{ data: { status: "UNKNOWN", message: "Warehouse status temporarily unavailable" } }]
set-payload.doc:name: Default Status Response

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Advancing stage | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Advance Request

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Stage advanced | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | New Status: " ++ (payload.data.status default "UNKNOWN")]
logger.doc:name: Log Stage Advanced

logger.message: #["[WAREHOUSE SYSTEM API] Stage advance failed | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log Advance Error
